## Summary

<!-- Describe your changes in 1-3 sentences -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New strategy agent
- [ ] Plugin
- [ ] Refactoring (no behavior change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Configuration / CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `pytest tests/unit/ -v`
- [ ] Lint clean: `ruff check src/ tests/unit/`
- [ ] Type check clean: `mypy src/aiswarm/ --ignore-missing-imports`
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
